Modmetadata.name: StorySpeaker - AI Narrator Voice
Modmetadata.author: ZM
Modmetadata.description:
Adds TTS (Text-to-Speech) voice to the StoryMaker AI storyteller. Requires StoryMaker mod and a locally running VoxCPM2 TTS server.

Features:
- Converts storyteller narration to voice during events
- Voice cloning via reference audio
- LoRA-based voice switching
- Dialogue voice synthesis (optional, adds delay)
